# IndexRidge GeoTIFF workflow sample catalog

Landing page: https://indexridge.github.io/geospectral-data-portal/
Machine-readable product metadata: https://indexridge.github.io/geospectral-data-portal/product-metadata.json
Catalog RSS feed: https://indexridge.github.io/geospectral-data-portal/rss.xml
Sitemap: https://indexridge.github.io/geospectral-data-portal/sitemap.xml

- Free Sentinel-2 NDVI GeoTIFF Mini Sample for QGIS/rasterio (Free): https://indexridge.gumroad.com/l/indexridge-free-sentinel-2-ndvi-geotiff-mini-sample — Free tiny Sentinel-2 NDVI GeoTIFF starter pack for checking QGIS, GDAL, and rasterio workflows before buying paid IndexRidge bundles.
- IndexRidge UK GIS GeoTIFF Starter Bundle — NDVI NDMI NDWI NDBI (£49): https://indexridge.gumroad.com/l/indexridge-uk-gis-geotiff-starter-bundle — Four UK Sentinel-2 GeoTIFF sample AOIs for agriculture, moisture, water/wetness, and built-surface GIS workflow testing.
- IndexRidge Global AOI GeoTIFF Starter Bundle — Agriculture Water Urban (£49): https://indexridge.gumroad.com/l/indexridge-global-aoi-geotiff-starter-bundle — Four non-UK regional sample AOIs — California, Nile Delta, Lake Mead, and Dubai — for Sentinel-derived GeoTIFF workflow testing.
- IndexRidge Sentinel-2 GeoTIFF Starter Catalog Bundle — 8 Sample AOIs (£79): https://indexridge.gumroad.com/l/indexridge-sentinel-2-geotiff-starter-catalog-bundle — All eight IndexRidge Sentinel-derived GeoTIFF sample AOI products in one discounted bundle for GIS, QGIS, rasterio, and dashboard testing.
- Sentinel-2 NDMI GeoTIFF Sample — East Anglia Crop Moisture (£19): https://indexridge.gumroad.com/l/indexridge-uk-agricultural-ndmi-moisture-geotiff-sample-layer — Ready-to-load Sentinel-2 NDMI moisture GeoTIFF sample for crop-stress, irrigation, and raster workflow testing.
- Sentinel-2 NDWI GeoTIFF Sample — Somerset Levels Water/Wetness (£19): https://indexridge.gumroad.com/l/indexridge-uk-floodplain-ndwi-water-geotiff-sample-layer — Ready-to-load Sentinel-2 NDWI water/wetness GeoTIFF sample for floodplain-style GIS, map, and ETL workflow testing.
- Sentinel-2 NDBI GeoTIFF Sample — West Midlands Built-Surface (£19): https://indexridge.gumroad.com/l/indexridge-uk-urban-ndbi-built-surface-geotiff-sample-layer — Ready-to-load Sentinel-2 NDBI built-surface GeoTIFF sample for urban analytics, planning-tech demos, and raster ETL tests.
- Sentinel-2 NDVI GeoTIFF Sample — East Anglia Agriculture (£19): https://indexridge.gumroad.com/l/indexridge-uk-agricultural-ndvi-geotiff-sample-layer — Ready-to-load Sentinel-2 NDVI GeoTIFF sample for QGIS, GDAL, rasterio, map dashboards, and agriculture workflow testing.
- Sentinel-2 NDVI GeoTIFF Sample — California Agriculture AOI (£19): https://indexridge.gumroad.com/l/indexridge-global-agriculture-ndvi-california-geotiff-sample-layer — Ready-to-load Sentinel-2 NDVI GeoTIFF sample for a California Central Valley agriculture AOI; useful for workflow testing, not global coverage.
- Sentinel-2 NDMI GeoTIFF Sample — Nile Delta Irrigated Agriculture AOI (£19): https://indexridge.gumroad.com/l/indexridge-global-irrigated-agriculture-ndmi-nile-delta-geotiff-sample-layer — Ready-to-load Sentinel-2 NDMI moisture GeoTIFF sample for a Nile Delta irrigated-agriculture AOI; useful for workflow testing, not global coverage.
- Sentinel-2 NDWI GeoTIFF Sample — Lake Mead Water Body AOI (£19): https://indexridge.gumroad.com/l/indexridge-global-water-body-ndwi-lake-mead-geotiff-sample-layer — Ready-to-load Sentinel-2 NDWI water-index GeoTIFF sample for a Lake Mead reservoir AOI; useful for water-mapping workflow tests.
- Sentinel-2 NDBI GeoTIFF Sample — Dubai Built-Surface AOI (£19): https://indexridge.gumroad.com/l/indexridge-global-urban-ndbi-dubai-built-surface-geotiff-sample-layer — Ready-to-load Sentinel-2 NDBI built-surface GeoTIFF sample for a Dubai urban AOI; useful for urban analytics workflow tests, not full-city validation.

AI/automation disclosure: AI-assisted automation was involved in selecting, processing, collating, packaging, and publishing this dataset. It has not been checked, validated, or approved by a human operator before publication. Treat it as an unverified analytical sample and validate independently before use.

Scope: regional sample AOI workflow packs, not official/regulatory/full-global datasets.

Structured data: the landing page includes schema.org DataCatalog/Dataset JSON-LD for the public catalog and product pages.
